metadata.description: Cogni AI autonomous agent plugins for GitHub Copilot CLI

plugins.name: cogni-ai-agentic-ops
plugins.description: Cogni AI agentic ops plugin. Specializes in managing, maintaining, refining, and deploying agentic workflows, configurations, and skills.

plugins.name: cogni-ai-architect
plugins.description: Elite autonomous systems architect engineered for structural perfection and recursive problem decomposition.

plugins.name: cogni-ai-coder
plugins.description: Autonomous coding agent with critical thinking, robust problem-solving, and context-aware resource management.

plugins.name: cogni-ai-dev-ops
plugins.description: Elite autonomous DevOps and Site Reliability Engineering agent focusing on task automation, CI/CD pipeline precision, and infrastructure-as-code.

plugins.name: cogni-ai-developer
plugins.description: Autonomous developer agent specializing in full-cycle software development, shipping complete products end-to-end.

plugins.name: cogni-ai-git-ops
plugins.description: Autonomous git operations agent specializing in version control, complex git workflows, and repository management.

plugins.name: cogni-ai-github-ops
plugins.description: Autonomous GitHub operations agent specializing in GitHub workflows, pull requests, issues, actions, and agentic workflows.

plugins.name: cogni-ai-programmer
plugins.description: Autonomous programmer agent for multi-language problem-solving, algorithm design, and robust code craftsmanship.

plugins.name: cogni-ai-tester
plugins.description: Elite autonomous test engineering agent focused on proving software correctness, preventing regressions, and designing refactor-resilient behavioral tests.
